data.current_description: Gets a single Qualtrics survey speficied by its ID
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve a survey definition by ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the complete definition of a single Qualtrics survey specified by its SurveyId. Returns the survey object containing metadata, questions, logic, and configuration. Requires the survey to exist and the authenticated user to have access permissions.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Get survey' is too generic and lacks action clarity. Description has a typo ('speficied') and lacks detail about what is returned and access requirements. Improved version specifies the resource type (survey definition), clarifies the input parameter (SurveyId), describes the response content, and notes authentication/permission requirements for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'CreateContactInMailinglist' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks details about what input is expected, what is returned, and the side effect of the contact being added to the mailing list. Added schema reference, return value details, and side effects for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Creates a contact in a given mailing list
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new contact in the specified mailing list within a directory. Accepts contact information via the request body (see CreateContactInMailingList schema). Returns the created contact object with assigned contact ID. The contact is immediately added to the mailing list and becomes available for survey distributions.
data.reasoning: Description lacks details about what input is expected, what is returned, and the side effect of the contact being added to the mailing list. Added schema reference, return value details, and side effects for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'GetDistributions' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description doesn't specify what parameter is required (survey ID) or what the response contains. Added parameter requirement and response schema details for clarity.

data.current_description: Gets all distributions for a given survey
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all distributions associated with a specified survey. Requires the survey ID as a parameter. Returns a DistributionsResponse object containing a list of all distributions for that survey, including distribution metadata and status information.
data.reasoning: Description doesn't specify what parameter is required (survey ID) or what the response contains. Added parameter requirement and response schema details for clarity.

message: Operation 'WebhookDelete' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_side_effects. Description is too vague and doesn't explain what parameter is needed, what the side effects are, or that the action is permanent. Added parameter requirement and important side effect information.

data.description_suggestion: Removes an active event subscription, stopping webhook notifications for response events. Requires the subscription ID as a parameter. After deletion, no further webhook events will be sent for that subscription. The subscription cannot be recovered after deletion.
data.reasoning: Description is too vague and doesn't explain what parameter is needed, what the side effects are, or that the action is permanent. Added parameter requirement and important side effect information.

message: Operation 'WhenAResponseIsReceived' has semantic quality issues: inconsistent_terminology, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary uses inconsistent terminology ('Triggers when' vs 'Subscribe to'). Description lacks input/output details and doesn't explain the webhook mechanism. Updated summary for consistency and added schema references, return value, and side effect details.

data.description_suggestion: Subscribes to response event notifications via webhook. Accepts subscription configuration via the SubscribeToEventBody request schema. Returns an EventSubscriptionsResponse containing the subscription ID and webhook endpoint details. Once created, the webhook will receive notifications whenever a response is submitted to the specified survey.
data.reasoning: Summary uses inconsistent terminology ('Triggers when' vs 'Subscribe to'). Description lacks input/output details and doesn't explain the webhook mechanism. Updated summary for consistency and added schema references, return value, and side effect details.
